phoneticUs: 藢忙n瑟藞m蓱藧m瑟tri; 藢忙n蓹藞m蓱藧m蓹tri
examples: This system focused on the anemometry at low velocity range.
Laser Doppler Anemometry (LDA) is a non-contact optical method for measuring flow velocity.
The flow field in the swirl chamber of a motored diesel engine was measured by Laser Doppler Anemometry (LDA).
